entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Environmental change causing vulnerability and requiring adaptation in farming systems

entities.name: RESILIENCE
entities.description: The capacity of smallholder farming systems to withstand and recover from climate change

entities.name: ADAPTATION
entities.description: The process of adjusting farming practices to mitigate the effects of climate change

entities.name: VULNERABILITY
entities.description: The susceptibility of smallholder farmers to the adverse effects of climate change

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER FARMING SYSTEMS
entities.description: Agricultural systems managed by small-scale farmers in semi-arid regions

entities.name: ZIMBABWE
entities.description: The country where the study on smallholder farming systems was conducted

entities.name: VULNERABILITY TO RESILIENCE MODEL
entities.description: A model used to analyze the transition from vulnerability to resilience

entities.name: BINARY LOGIT MODEL
entities.description: A statistical model used to analyze factors influencing household adaptation decisions

entities.name: CLIMATE INFORMATION
entities.description: Data regarding weather and climate patterns provided to farmers

entities.name: EXTENSION SERVICES
entities.description: Agricultural support services that provide information and technology to farmers

entities.name: LIVESTOCK
entities.description: Farm animals owned by households that enhance their adaptive capacity

entities.name: CREDIT
entities.description: Access to financial loans to support adaptation strategies

entities.name: FARM INCOME
entities.description: The revenue generated from farming activities

entities.name: LABOUR SAVING TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Technologies designed to reduce the amount of manual labor required in farming

relationships.description: Climate change necessitates the building of resilience
Climate change drives the need for adaptation
Climate change increases the vulnerability of smallholder farmers
Used to analyze factors increasing resilience
Used to analyze factors causing vulnerability
Used to analyze factors influencing adaptation decisions
Increased access to climate information improves adaptation abilities
Extension services provide farmers with climate information
Higher farm income may reduce the incentive to adapt
Development of these technologies increases resilience for labor-constrained farmers
The farming systems studied are located in Zimbabwe
